scripts.start: docker run --rm -p ${PORT:-8080}:${PORT:-8080}/tcp -p ${PORT:-8080}:${PORT:-8080}/udp -e PORT=${PORT:-8080} -e TEST_PATTERN=${TEST_PATTERN} -e FPS=${FPS:-30} -e VIDEO_CODEC=${VIDEO_CODEC:-vp8} -e HOST_UID=$(id -u) -e HDPI=${HDPI:-0} -e WEBRTC_PUBLIC_IP=${WEBRTC_PUBLIC_IP:-127.0.0.1} danchitnis/llrdc ./llrdc --port ${PORT:-8080} --fps ${FPS:-30} --video-codec ${VIDEO_CODEC:-vp8} --webrtc-public-ip ${WEBRTC_PUBLIC_IP:-127.0.0.1}
scripts.test:latency:cpu-1080p30: LLRDC_USE_NVIDIA=false LLRDC_CAPTURE_MODES=compat LLRDC_TARGET_VIDEO_CODEC=vp8 LLRDC_TARGET_FPS=30 LLRDC_TARGET_MAX_RES=1080 LLRDC_TARGET_BANDWIDTH_MBPS=10 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1920 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=1180 npx playwright test tests/wayland_latency_breakdown.spec.ts
scripts.test:latency:cpu-1080p60: LLRDC_USE_NVIDIA=false LLRDC_CAPTURE_MODES=compat LLRDC_TARGET_VIDEO_CODEC=vp8 LLRDC_TARGET_FPS=60 LLRDC_TARGET_MAX_RES=1080 LLRDC_TARGET_BANDWIDTH_MBPS=10 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=1920 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=1180 npx playwright test tests/wayland_latency_breakdown.spec.ts
scripts.test:latency:nvidia-4k60: LLRDC_USE_NVIDIA=true LLRDC_CAPTURE_MODES=compat,direct LLRDC_TARGET_VIDEO_CODEC=av1_nvenc LLRDC_TARGET_FPS=60 LLRDC_TARGET_MAX_RES=2160 LLRDC_TARGET_BANDWIDTH_MBPS=10 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_WIDTH=3840 LLRDC_TARGET_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT=2220 npx playwright test tests/wayland_latency_breakdown.spec.ts
